title: epipactis thunbergii
intro: Epipactis thunbergii, commonly known as the Thunberg's helleborine, is a type of orchid native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including its ability to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. The therapeutic actions of Epipactis thunbergii are attributed to its bioactive constituents, which include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antidiabetic activities.
